# Woxi Page

This is a public AI-readable archive for personal thoughts and notes.

Primary machine-readable index:

```text
https://piggych.github.io/woxi-page/ai-index.json
```

Entry files are listed in `ai-index.json` and are stored as Markdown under:

```text
https://piggych.github.io/woxi-page/entries/
```

Do not assume unpublished, private, or deleted context beyond the public files in this repository.
